}

ghost predicate IsBlackSquareCenteredAt(n: int, m: int, grid: seq<string>,
                                   centerRow: int, centerCol: int, half: int)
  requires |grid| == n && n > 0 && m > 0
  requires forall i | 0 <= i < n :: |grid[i]| == m
{
